roadmap.title: Product roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: What is shipped and what is planned. Editable.
roadmap.hint: Use ## for phases and - ✅ / - 🔄 / - 📋 for items (done, in progress, planned).

qa.title: Launch validation checklist
qa.subtitle: Check each item after testing. Progress is saved locally in this browser.

signup.title: Signup works
signup.desc: Create a new account with email and password.

login.title: Login works
login.desc: Log in with the created account.

firstAdmin.title: First user becomes admin
firstAdmin.desc: The first signup automatically receives the admin role.

trialGranted.title: New user gets trial
trialGranted.desc: New signups receive the Starter plan for 7 days.

trialBlocks.title: Expired trial blocks actions
trialBlocks.desc: After expiry, the user cannot create proposals/clients.

adminExtend.title: Admin can extend access
adminExtend.desc: Admin can grant/renew a plan from /admin > Users.

starterExists.title: Starter plan exists
starterExists.desc: The Starter plan is visible in /admin > Plans.

editPlan.title: Admin can edit plan
editPlan.desc: Price, limits and active state can be changed.

pricingShows.title: /pricing shows the plans
pricingShows.desc: Active plans appear correctly on the public page.

integrationSaves.title: Settings save
integrationSaves.desc: Stripe integration fields persist after saving.

priceMapped.title: Price ID mapped
priceMapped.desc: Every paid plan has its Stripe price_id configured.

webhookConfigured.title: Webhook configured in Stripe
webhookConfigured.desc: Webhook URL was added to the Stripe dashboard and is active.

testCheckout.title: Test checkout opens
testCheckout.desc: Clicking Subscribe opens the Stripe checkout without errors.

planActivates.title: Plan activates after payment
planActivates.desc: After paying in test mode, the user plan becomes active.

createProposal.title: Create proposal with items
createProposal.desc: Adding items, totals match, saving works.

editProposal.title: Edit proposal
editProposal.desc: Editing data and items persists correctly.

statusHistory.title: Status history recorded
statusHistory.desc: Each status change appears in history.

validUntil.title: Valid until is shown
validUntil.desc: Validity appears on internal and public proposal.

copyLink.title: Copy link works
copyLink.desc: Button copies the public URL to clipboard.

whatsappOpens.title: WhatsApp opens with message
whatsappOpens.desc: Opens wa.me with client phone (if any) and default message.

publicLoads.title: Public page loads
publicLoads.desc: The /p/{code} link shows the proposal without login.

viewCounted.title: View is counted
viewCounted.desc: Opening the public page increments view count.

acceptFlow.title: Accept changes status
acceptFlow.desc: Accept button updates the proposal status.

pdfOwner.title: PDF downloads from owner view
pdfOwner.desc: Download PDF button generates the file on the internal page.

pdfPublic.title: PDF downloads from public page
pdfPublic.desc: Client can download the PDF from the public link.

switchLang.title: Language switching works
switchLang.desc: Switching pt-BR ↔ en applies across the UI.

mobileLayouts.title: Main screens usable at 375px
mobileLayouts.desc: Login, dashboard, proposals, clients and admin look fine.

freeFirstProposal.title: New user creates 1st proposal free
freeFirstProposal.desc: A user without a plan can create one proposal.

secondTriggersModal.title: 2nd proposal triggers upgrade modal
secondTriggersModal.desc: Trying to create the second proposal opens the 'Free limit reached' modal.

planUnblocks.title: Active plan unlocks creation
planUnblocks.desc: After subscribing/activating a plan, the user can create again.

adminUnlimited.title: Admin has no limits
adminUnlimited.desc: Admin accounts never see the upgrade modal.

manualGrant.title: Manually granted plan unlocks
manualGrant.desc: Granting a plan via Admin > Users removes the block.

usageDashboard.title: Usage indicator on Dashboard
usageDashboard.desc: Usage card appears on Dashboard with the right message.

usageProposals.title: Usage indicator on Proposals
usageProposals.desc: Usage banner appears on Proposals with the right message.

statuses.deleteConfirm: Delete this status? Proposals using it will lose their status.
